lastStrategyDecision.reason: Market evidence is still only marginal for automated intraday execution: neutral regime, average relative volume 1.05 (limited participation edge), slight negative average gap (-0.3) reducing clean continuation setups, moderate liquidity score (~51.9) increasing slippage/stop reliability risk, and weak catalyst score (~25.2) lowering follow-through probability. UptrendShare 0.55 is only a mild long-only tailwind. Data freshness is excellent (20/20), so continue scanning/ranking, but avoid new orders until liquidity and relative volume improve and/or catalysts strengthen. Keep conservative long-only pullback-to-VWAP with bracket exits for clear stops and auditability; maintain small paper risk caps. Paper active exploration is enabled: live market data is fresh and the setup quality is acceptable, so the desk may take small paper trades while risk gates remain active.
